mapper.select: SELECT id, hospital_name as hospitalName, hospital_level as hospitalLevel, address, latitude, longitude, phone, introduction, status, create_time as createTime, ( 6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{latitude})) * cos(radians(latitude)) * cos(radians(longitude) - radians(#{longitude})) + sin(radians(#{latitude})) * sin(radians(latitude)) ) ) AS distance FROM hospital WHERE status = 1 AND is_delete = 0 HAVING distance < #{radius} ORDER BY distance ASC LIMIT #{limit}
